name: Should I tell my lawyer I already talked to ChatGPT about the case?

mainEntity.name: Should I tell my lawyer I already talked to ChatGPT about the case?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, disclose fully for accurate advice and strategy adjustment.[1] Builds trust; avoids surprises.[2] Key factors: Impacts assessment; ethical duties; efficiency. Be honest early; provide outputs if helpful. Full disclosure protects you.
